# hasConfigureSheet

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the screen saver has an associated configuration sheet.

## Declaration

```swift
var hasConfigureSheet: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

If you provide a configuration sheet in your bundle, override this method and return [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].

## Accessing the configuration sheet

- **configureSheet**: The window that contains the controls to configure the screen saver.
